question.label: Early decisions
question.name: Where did you miss the chance to shape a decision early?
question.description: Pins the discussion to one concrete moment so the influence pattern is grounded in evidence.

answer: Some feedback has been about being clearer with non-technical partners.

assessment.note: She names a specific clarity gap with non-technical partners, which directly confirms the missed-early-influence pattern.

new_queue.label: Impact in practice
new_queue.name: Can you walk me through one decision from the last quarter where your work changed an outcome?

new_queue.label: Stakeholder traction
new_queue.name: Where did you have the most traction with stakeholders this quarter?

new_queue.label: Gap awareness
new_queue.name: Where do you think you've fallen short of where you want to be?

new_queue.label: Tradeoff pattern
new_queue.name: What do you usually trade off first when pressure rises?

new_queue.label: Next two weeks
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, what do you want to do differently in the next two weeks?

history.answer_excerpt: I think my technical output is solid, but my influence is uneven.
I think my technical output is solid, but my influence is uneven.
I get work done, yet I am not consistently shaping decisions early.
Some feedback has been about being clearer with non-technical partners.
